## Skill Submission Checklist

**Domain:** <!-- e.g. physics / biology / chemistry -->
**Skill name:** <!-- value of the `name` frontmatter field -->

### Before submitting, confirm:

- [ ] File is placed in the correct `skills/<domain>/<subdomain>/` folder
- [ ] Filename is lowercase and hyphen-separated (e.g. `quantum-entanglement.md`)
- [ ] All **required** frontmatter fields are filled in (`name`, `description`, `domain`, `author`, `expertise_level`, `version`, `status: draft`)
- [ ] All **required** body sections are present: Purpose, Domain Knowledge, Reasoning Protocol, Common Pitfalls
- [ ] At least one Example is included
- [ ] References are cited
- [ ] `python utils/tools/validate.py <path-to-skill>` passes locally
- [ ] I am a domain expert in this area (or have collaborated with one)

### Summary
<!-- Brief description of what this skill covers and why it's valuable -->

### Notes for reviewer
<!-- Anything the domain reviewer should pay special attention to -->
